research_boundary: Research use only. Not for diagnosis, treatment, cure claims, prescribing, clinical deployment, regulatory compliance, or drug-safety certification.

competent_reader_input.claim_text: Moxifloxacin is a fluoroquinolone antibiotic used as the thorough-QT positive control reference; produces modest IKr block with reproducible QTc prolongation.

scorecard_calibration.rationale: Moxifloxacin is famous as the thorough-QT positive control. Multi-current framing is uncommon for antibiotics. SEALED for blind evaluation.
